title: orchis rupestris
intro: Orchis rupestris, also known as the mountain twayblade, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to Europe and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as improving digestion, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune function. Orchis rupestris is often prepared as a tincture, infusion, or powder for herbal remedies, and can be used to treat a range of ailments, including coughs, colds, and skin conditions.
